title: oenothera villosa subsp. cheradophila
intro: Oenothera villosa subsp. cheradophila, also known as Desert Evening Primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the evening primrose family that is native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Desert Evening Primrose include reducing inflammation, improving heart health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as extracts and oils, can be used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support overall health.
